title: No AutoJump
description: Completely remove the autojump feature from Minecraft.
body:
# No AutoJump It can be a pain to have autojump even in the control screen. So why not just remove it? ### Info ⚠️This is a Fabric only mod and there are no plans to make a forge version. ![Button Not in Controls](https://github.com/Declipsonator/No-AutoJump/blob/main/spacer.png?raw=true)

## Server Hosting! Kinetic Hosting is a minecraft serving hosting website with competitive prices. Get 10% off your first month when you use code "declip".
